message:
Anthropic: wrap context errors, inject web search in Stream(), populate RateLimit

Fixes D-01: Complete() now parses x-ratelimit-* headers into Response.RateLimit.
Fixes D-02: Stream() now adds web_search_20250305 tool when req.WebSearch is true.
Fixes D-03: Complete() now wraps context.Canceled/DeadlineExceeded via WrapContextError.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
